description: Loads the SDD constitution and immutable operating rules.
Provides host project context, architecture, and conventions.
Enforces feature-branch and worktree rules for this repository.
Captures pytest, tmp_path, and project-specific test fixture norms.
Scans skills, prompts, and templates for references to amended constitution content. Returns alignment verdict per reference (ALIGNED / NEEDS-REVIEW / NEEDS-UPDATE). Backs /constitution and ADR-0006.
Guides greenfield and brownfield project kickoff to a best-fit archetype, with /evolve fallback when none fit.
Runs one-question-at-a-time clarification sessions.
Extends clarification sessions with CONTEXT.md and ADR updates.
Converts clarified requirements into a feature spec.
Builds an implementation plan from an approved spec.
Breaks approved plans into dispatchable tasks.
Scores and prioritizes incoming ideas using backlog rules.
Guides workers through task implementation and reporting.
Enforces red-green-refactor and test-first delivery.
Mechanical diff check for spec-compliance reviewer: production code added without tests is flagged unless tagged [NO-TEST-NEEDED]. Backs Article X.
Performs root-cause analysis before any proposed fix.
Runs stage-1 and stage-2 review checks for completed work.
Evaluates structural changes and architecture tradeoffs.
Applies dispatch logic, conflict checks, and batch management.
Compacts a session into a short handoff document for the next session or agent, referencing artifacts by path.
Append a tagged lesson candidate to the current PI's lessons.md when project work reveals a missing skill, unclear role, template gap, or constitution ambiguity. Feeds /evolve.
Supports PI planning, sprint planning, and backlog shaping.
Constrains brownfield workers to preserve existing conventions and avoid out-of-scope rewrites.
Drafts new generic worker roles and specialist promotions for /hire, including agent templates, roster schema, Fleet state, and ledger decision convention.
Default communication mode for the Executive Manager. Enforces 'recommend, do not menu' so routine sequencing decisions do not tax the human's cognitive budget. Triggered by LESSON-005.
Default Azure deployment pattern (Container Apps + Entra ID auth + scale-to-zero) with security defaults, threat-model template, and cost ceiling. Owned by principal-cloud-security-architect.
Encodes project-specific pytest execution and triage patterns.
Captures FastAPI route conventions for Day-to-Day.
Captures HTMX, Jinja2, and template-level UI conventions.
Generates or updates the weekly 1:1 status report by scanning git commits, code changes, tests, specs, sessions, and sprints. Appends a new week section to docs/1_1_STATUS_REPORT_SDD.md.
